content:
MODULE: cosmos.automation.n8n_templates
FILE: cosmos/automation/n8n_templates.py (965 lines)
CATEGORY: automation

DESCRIPTION: cosmos n8n Workflow Templates

"I've created over 6000 workflow templates! ...Actually, I lost count after 12."

Comprehensive n8n workflow templates for automated setup and common integrations.

CLASSES:
- WorkflowCategory(Enum): Categories of workflow templates.
- WorkflowTemplate: A workflow template definition.
- N8nTemplateLibrary: Library of n8n workflow templates.

Provides ready-to-use workflows for:
- Healt
  Methods: def list_templates(self, category: Optional[WorkflowCategory]=None, tag: Optional[str]=None) -> List
  Methods: def get_template(self, template_id: str) -> Optional[WorkflowTemplate]
  Methods: def generate_workflow(self, template_id: str, config: Dict[str, Any]=None) -> Optional[N8nWorkflow]
  Methods: async def deploy_workflow(self, template_id: str, config: Dict[str, Any]=None, activate: bool=True)
